tasks.label: 1. Prepare Builder
tasks.command: export DOCKER_API_VERSION=1.43 && cd build-image && docker build -t taha/wolfi-build-image:latest . && cd ../2-builder && pack builder create taha/wolfi-fips-builder:latest --config builder.toml

tasks.label: 2. Prepare Run Image
tasks.command: export DOCKER_API_VERSION=1.43 && cd run-image && docker build -t taha/wolfi-run-image:latest .

tasks.label: 3. Build App Maven
tasks.command: export DOCKER_API_VERSION=1.43 && pack build taha/maven-fips-app --path 3-sample-app --builder taha/wolfi-fips-builder:latest --env BP_JVM_TYPE=JRE --publish=false
